section.title: 🏢 Services & Local Procurement · Four-Base Supplier Navigation · 🏢 综合服务与属地采购 · 四大基地供应商导航
section.sub: 15 indirect & service categories — staffing / events / advertising / office / IT / consulting / commuting / security / canteen / insurance / MRO / labs — laid out on a 'national top platform + local backup' dual track. Click a category for map navigation and see each of the four bases' (Shanghai·Nansha·Gulei·Chongqing) top service provider at a glance. · 人力 / 会务 / 广告 / 办公 / IT / 咨询 / 通勤 / 安保 / 食堂 / 保险 / MRO / 实验室 等 15 类间接与服务采购 —— 按『全国头部平台 + 属地兜底』双轨布局，点击品类进入地图导航，一图看清四大基地（上海·南沙·古雷·重庆）各自的首选服务商。

bases.feature: Foreign-compliance & digitalization benchmark · 外资合规与数字化标杆
Coastal high-corrosion-resistance · FTZ-compliant · 临海高防腐·自贸区合规
Extreme-weather typhoon-proof · zero hazwaste downtime · 极端天气防台·危废零停产
Mountain conditions · SW supply-chain hub · 山地工况·西南供应链枢纽

categories.tagline: Cleaning / landscaping / routine plant-facility maintenance · 保洁 / 绿化 / 厂区设施常态化维保
categories.model: Local property mgmt · routine facility maintenance · 属地物业 · 常态化设施维保
categories.redline: Fire maintenance & inspection is formally part of this category: must bind a fire firm registered in MEM's Social Fire Technical Service system, taking monthly-maintenance and annual fire-electrical-inspection responsibility; high-altitude/electrical special work requires certified staff. · 消防维保检测正式归入本品类：须绑定应急管理部「社会消防技术服务信息系统」备案的消防机构，承担月度维保与年度消电检技术责任；高空/用电特种作业持证上岗。
compliance: 消防维保机构备案（应急管理部）
特种作业持证（高空/用电）
tips: 消防维保与法定检测由物业主体对接备案机构，权责与安保完全分离
设施维保纳入 EHS 作业许可，明确保洁/绿化/消防 SLA 标准
